examples: The Canada lynx shows a ten-year cycle of abundance that parallels the abundance cycle of hares.
Fruit and vegetables grew in abundance on the island.
This area of Mexico has an abundance of safe beaches and a pleasing climate.
Ah, the Olympia oyster, the plains buffalo of western mollusks: a golden memory of primordial abundance.
The park's steep slopes house cliffs, caves, streams, waterfalls and an abundance of native and exotic trees.
